name: Hailuo AI (MiniMax Video)
pricing_notes: Video generation: ~$0.05/second of generated video; text ~$0.01/1K tokens

auth.notes: GroupId + API key pair; Authorization: Bearer in header

performance.notes: Video generation (6-30s clips) takes 30-120s to complete; text completion ~500ms

agent_readiness.notes: Covers text-to-video, text-to-speech, text completion. Chinese provider; docs primarily in Chinese with English translation. Requires GroupId + API key pair (unusual auth).

gotchas: Chinese provider — data sovereignty/compliance concerns for Western users
Documentation primarily in Chinese; English docs lag
Unusual auth requiring both GroupId and API key
No webhook support — must poll for video generation status
Terms of service complex for commercial deployment
best_when: Need video generation competitive with Kling/Sora at lower cost
Chinese market / APAC deployment where MiniMax has presence
Prototyping video generation features before committing to premium providers
avoid_when: Western markets with data residency requirements
Production systems requiring stable English documentation
summary: Hailuo AI (by MiniMax) is a Chinese AI platform offering competitive text-to-video, TTS, and LLM APIs. Video quality rivals Kling and Runway at lower prices. Major friction points: Chinese-first documentation, unusual GroupId+API key auth, no webhooks for async video jobs, and data sovereignty concerns for Western enterprise users.
